description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist cubic design with clean white exterior walls and large, dark-framed windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. The roof is a striking element, composed of intersecting metal-clad pyramidal forms with visible rivets, giving it an industrial touch. The front entryway is recessed and includes a single glass door with a small overhang and a tiled landing area. The windows are asymmetrically arranged, with one side showcasing a large picture window and another side featuring two smaller windows. The house appears to be a single-story structure, with interior furnishings visible through the glass, suggesting a compact but functional living space. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, blending geometric simplicity with industrial roofing details.
description: A modern, cubic single-story house with large dark-framed windows and a distinctive metal pyramidal roof. The exterior is white and minimalist, with an industrial touch from the riveted metal roof panels.
description_view_0: This view shows the main entryway with a glass door, a small tiled porch, and a large window to the left.
description_view_1: This side highlights a large picture window and the continuation of the tiled porch, with the metal roof's intersecting peaks visible above.
description_view_2: This view displays two windows of different sizes, revealing interior furnishings and emphasizing the asymmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_3: This side features a single window and a clear view of the metal roof's structure, with minimal exterior detailing.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed glass door with a small tiled porch and minimal overhang
